title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
